title: Make clean need adjustment for easyjson
body:
/kind bug
**Description**

After following the install instructions and then doing `make clean` followed by `make` a compilation error occurs.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.  Install/clone podman per install instructions

2. make.install

3.  make

4.  make clean

5.  make

**Describe the results you received:**
```
# make clean
rm -rf \
	.gopathok \
	_output \
	bin \
	build \
	test/bin2img/bin2img \
	test/checkseccomp/checkseccomp \
	test/copyimg/copyimg \
	test/testdata/redis-image \
	cmd/podman/varlink/iopodman.go \
	libpod/container_ffjson.go \
	libpod/pod_ffjson.go \
	libpod/container_easyjson.go \
	libpod/pod_easyjson.go \
	docs/podman-varlink.1 docs/podman-pod-stop.1 docs/podman-rmi.1 docs/podman.1 docs/podman-attach.1 docs/containers-mounts.conf.5 docs/podman-diff.1 docs/podman-exec.1 docs/podman-create.1 docs/podman-container.1 docs/podman-info.1 docs/podman-container-cleanup.1 docs/podman-images.1 docs/podman-umount.1 docs/podman-pod-top.1 docs/podman-pod-inspect.1 docs/podman-pod-pause.1 docs/podman-save.1 docs/podman-import.1 docs/podman-pod-restart.1 docs/podman-pod-start.1 docs/podman-top.1 docs/podman-inspect.1 docs/podman-image.1 docs/podman-login.1 docs/podman-pause.1 docs/podman-history.1 docs/podman-pod-unpause.1 docs/podman-stats.1 docs/podman-pull.1 docs/podman-pod-kill.1 docs/podman-version.1 docs/podman-start.1 docs/podman-pod.1 docs/podman-unpause.1 docs/podman-run.1 docs/podman-tag.1 docs/podman-port.1 docs/podman-stop.1 docs/podman-kill.1 docs/podman-wait.1 docs/podman-commit.1 docs/podman-export.1 docs/libpod.conf.5 docs/podman-load.1 docs/podman-logs.1 docs/podman-restart.1 docs/podman-push.1 docs/podman-pod-rm.1 docs/podman-cp.1 docs/podman-pod-ps.1 docs/podman-rm.1 docs/podman-mount.1 docs/podman-container-refresh.1 docs/podman-build.1 docs/podman-logout.1 docs/podman-ps.1 docs/podman-pod-create.1 docs/podman-search.1 pkg/hooks/docs/oci-hooks.5 ||:
make -C contrib/python/podman clean
make[1]: Entering directory '/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/podman'
/usr/bin/python3 setup.py clean --all
running clean
removing 'build/lib' (and everything under it)
removing 'build/bdist.linux-x86_64' (and everything under it)
'build/scripts-3.6' does not exist -- can't clean it

rm -rf podman.egg-info dist
find . -depth -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} \;
find . -depth -name \*.pyc -exec rm -f {} \;
make[1]: Leaving directory '/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/podman'
make -C contrib/python/pypodman clean
make[1]: Entering directory '/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/pypodman'
/usr/bin/python3 setup.py clean --all
running clean
removing 'build/lib' (and everything under it)
removing 'build/bdist.linux-x86_64' (and everything under it)
'build/scripts-3.6' does not exist -- can't clean it
removing 'build'
rm -rf pypodman.egg-info dist
find . -depth -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} \;
find . -depth -name \*.pyc -exec rm -f {} \;
make[1]: Leaving directory '/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/pypodman'
find . -name \*~ -delete
find . -name \#\* -delete

# git status
On branch master
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/master'.

Changes not staged for commit:
  (use "git add/rm <file>..." to update what will be committed)
  (use "git checkout -- <file>..." to discard changes in working directory)

	deleted:    libpod/container_easyjson.go
	deleted:    libpod/pod_easyjson.go

no changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a")

# make
touch .gopathok
go generate ./cmd/podman/varlink/...
rm -f libpod/container_easyjson.go
cd "/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod" && easyjson ./libpod/container.go
/bin/sh: easyjson: command not found
make: *** [Makefile:308: libpod/container_easyjson.go] Error 127

# checking out the files and doing make again works.
# git checkout libpod/container_easyjson.go libpod/pod_easyjson.go

# make
touch .gopathok
go build -i -ldflags ' -X main.gitCommit="4ddcbd7941e8cb32cbdcac2f1aa3a939e82be764" -X main.buildInfo=1536155250' -tags "seccomp    ostree selinux  varlink" -o bin/podman github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman
make -C contrib/python/podman python-podman
make[1]: Entering directory '/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/podman'
{lots of happy build output removed}
Installing pypodman script to build/bdist.linux-x86_64/dumb/usr/local/bin
Creating tar archive
removing 'build/bdist.linux-x86_64/dumb' (and everything under it)
make[1]: Leaving directory '/root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/pypodman'

```

**Describe the results you expected:**
The make after make clean should work without a git checkout being required.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
0.9.1-dev
```

comments.body: It looks like you're missing the `easyjson` command - try `make install.easyjson`

```
# make install.easyjson
make: *** No rule to make target 'install.easyjson'.  Stop.
```

I also tried:   go get -u github.com/mailru/easyjson and that doesn't help also.

I think the issue is the libpod/container_easyjson.go and libpod/pod_easyjson.go files are being deleted during the `make clean` process and should not be, or at least should be regenerated by the make somehow.
They will be, assuming easyjson is present - `easyjson_generate` will regenerate them. Not sure why it's not firing for you - do you have `$GOPATH/bin` in your PATH?

I did not have that in my path.  I needed to do:
export PATH=$PATH:$GOPATH/bin
and then it worked.   Smells like an installation notes modification is needed.
We should be recommending that anyways - `install.tools` for `make lint`, etc already required it
Touching up the install.md now.  FWIW, not having this hasn't bit me until pretty recently.
Closing as install.md has been changed to reflect this
